steps.name: Add 6 new layout class presets (12 JSON files: 6 layouts x 2 formats)
Create 6 new Remotion primitives for new component-kinds
Update preset test to cover 22 files + 11 layout classes
steps.last_error: First run failed: process.cwd() resolved to monorepo root, not package dir; fixed by using import.meta.url-based path resolution

steps.name: Update backend scene_validator LAYOUT_LIMITS for 6 new layouts
Run vitest + backend validation — confirm 30 tests pass, 11 layouts load
Add backend unit tests for new layout validator limits

decisions.decision: New layout preset filenames use kebab-case: BigNumber→big-number, VersusTable→versus-table, all others→lowercase
decisions.rationale: Matches existing convention (text-focus, media-full, media-text already used kebab-case)

decisions.decision: 6 layout limits assigned: BigNumber(1-2 texts, 0-1 images), Chart(1-3, 0-1), VersusTable(1-2, 0-1), List(1-2, 0-1), Quote(1-2, 0-1), Code(1-2, 0-1)
decisions.rationale: Consistent with semantic purpose: stat+body for BigNumber, heading+chart+body for Chart, etc.
